task.title: Render generated graph as interactive visual map
task.summary: Implement the Control Room Graph view by visualizing .codewiki/index_graph.json with filters and source-backed node/edge inspection.

goal.outcome: Users can inspect generated CodeWiki graph relationships visually without reading raw JSON.
acceptance: Graph view renders nodes and edges from .codewiki/index_graph.json.
Users can filter by node kind and edge kind at minimum.
Selecting a node or edge shows source paths, kind, state/freshness when available, and relationship detail.
The view distinguishes generated graph state from canonical truth.
Large graphs remain usable through limits, filtering, search, or scoped views.
non_goals: No replacement of .codewiki/index_graph.json as generated truth.
No exhaustive real-time physics simulation if a simpler visual layout is sufficient for MVP.

evidence: control-room.test.mjs verifies graph node kinds, shown edge count, and API-serving path.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Added Graph API read model and browser SVG graph rendering with filters, search, node inspector, and edge inspector.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: control-room.test.mjs verifies graph node kinds, shown edge count, and API-serving path.
code_change_evidence: Added Graph API read model and browser SVG graph rendering with filters, search, node inspector, and edge inspector.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph view renders nodes and edges from .codewiki/index_graph.json.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: buildControlRoomGraphModel reads index_graph nodes/edges; browser drawGraphMap renders them as SVG nodes and edge lines.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Users can filter by node kind and edge kind at minimum.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph toolbar includes node kind and edge kind dropdowns backed by node_kinds and edge_kinds from graph data.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Selecting a node or edge shows source paths, kind, state/freshness when available, and relationship detail.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Node clicks render normalized node JSON plus linked edges; edge clicks render edge kind/from/to/label detail and generated-state guidance.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: The view distinguishes generated graph state from canonical truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Inspector copy says graph relationships are generated state and canonical changes use source paths/compiler loops.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Large graphs remain usable through limits, filtering, search, or scoped views.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph model limits nodes/edges, exposes truncation stats, and UI filters by node kind, edge kind, and search.
npx tsc --noEmit and npm test passed.

risks: Large real-world graphs may need richer layout and virtualized rendering after MVP feedback.

Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.

closure_brief.user_intent: Render generated CodeWiki graph relationships as an interactive visual map.
implemented_changes: Added SVG graph view with node-kind filter, edge-kind filter, search, node inspector, and edge inspector.
Added generated-state guidance so the graph view does not become canonical truth.
acceptance_evidence: control-room.test.mjs verifies graph node kinds and shown edge count.
npx tsc --noEmit and npm test passed.
non_goals_preserved: No replacement of .codewiki/index_graph.json as generated truth.
No exhaustive real-time physics simulation if a simpler visual layout is sufficient for MVP.
remaining_risks: Large real-world graphs may need richer layout and virtualized rendering after MVP feedback.
